SEARCH
Module it.polimi.ingsw.am37
Package it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.objective

Class ResourcesBoundObjective

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.Card
it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.objective.ObjectiveCard
it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.objective.ResourcesBoundObjective
public class ResourcesBoundObjective extends ObjectiveCard
The ResourcesBoundObjective class represents the specific objective cards that require a certain amount of visible objects in the Kingdom to obtain the points indicated on the objective card.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ResourcesBoundObjective(int id, int points, Hashtable<Resource,Integer> resourceNeeded)
    The ResourcesBoundObjective(id, points, resourceNeeded) constructor uses the constructor of the superclass to assign the id and points and then assigns the resourceNeeded attribute to the one given as parameter.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    calculateNumOfCompletion(Kingdom kingdom)
    The calculateNumOfCompletion(kingdom) method receives the kingdom of the player as a parameter and calculates the number of times that the object is satisfied, returning said number.
    String
    toString(boolean utfActive)
    the toString method shows the amount and type of resources the objective requires.

  • Constructor Details

    • ResourcesBoundObjective

      public ResourcesBoundObjective(int id, int points, Hashtable<Resource,Integer> resourceNeeded)
      The ResourcesBoundObjective(id, points, resourceNeeded) constructor uses the constructor of the superclass to assign the id and points and then assigns the resourceNeeded attribute to the one given as parameter.
      Parameters:
      id - An integer to uniquely identify the card.
      points - An integer that indicates how many points can the Player can receive.
      resourceNeeded - A Hashtable that represents the needed resources to obtain the points indicated on the card.

  • Method Details

    • calculateNumOfCompletion

      public int calculateNumOfCompletion(Kingdom kingdom)
      The calculateNumOfCompletion(kingdom) method receives the kingdom of the player as a parameter and calculates the number of times that the object is satisfied, returning said number.
      Specified by:
      calculateNumOfCompletion in class ObjectiveCard
      Parameters:
      kingdom - The kingdom attribute of the player, where the cards are placed.
      Returns:
      The number of times the objective is satisfied by the player.

    • toString

      public String toString(boolean utfActive)
      the toString method shows the amount and type of resources the objective requires.
      Specified by:
      toString in class ObjectiveCard
      Parameters:
      utfActive - is a boolean which tells if the encoding is enable.
      Returns:
      a String showing the resources required in each objective.
